title: bug with bit-swap inside a large signal (more than 64 bits)

features.name: large signal bit-slice part-select indexing
features.description: Code should include a signal wider than 64 bits with part-select indexing using [offset+:width] syntax

features.name: bit-swapping via concatenation of part-selects
features.description: Code should include a concatenation operation that swaps bits using part-select indices on a signal larger than 64 bits
